'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=wq5sdPheIcJjOQCNl9oKfSDke27dvg.cJpS4A1uEp18-1775356673-1.0.1.1-trIko782i.Q9uVAbbYEKixtLhdWjx2q351X.0qqAygc"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
